The '''''Wayward Girl''''' was owned by [[Jadonna Veloz]]. [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] piloted it from [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]] to [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]] so that he could attend the [[Cloud City Sabacc Tournament]]. It carried [[nerf tenderloin]]s in stasis for the [[Yarith Bespin/Legends|Yarith Bespin]] kitchens.

{{Ship-stub}}

*''[[Rebel Dawn]]'' {{1st}}
